## Security Checklist
<!-- Required for any changes touching server.js, dm/app.js, or remote/ -->
- [ ] No sensitive files newly exposed via static serving
- [ ] No raw `innerHTML` used with user/server-supplied data
- [ ] WS actions that require DM auth are in the `DM_ACTIONS` list
